title: Danny Sheehan says George Bush Sr. had pre-knowledge of JFK's assassination.
summary: Danny Sheehan discusses claims about George H.W. Bush and Lyndon Johnson having pre-knowledge of JFK's assassination. He alleges they were briefed before the event because Kennedy was viewed as a traitor for attempting to disassemble nuclear warheads.

acronyms.definition: U.S. intelligence agency; context indicates George H.W. Bush was affiliated with it

key_claims.claim: George H.W. Bush had pre-knowledge of JFK's assassination but was not directly involved in planning it
Lyndon Johnson was notified before JFK's assassination that it was going to happen
George H.W. Bush was at Clint Murchison's ranch in Dallas being briefed before the assassination
JFK was viewed as a traitor because he was planning to physically disassemble and destroy nuclear warheads
J. Edgar Hoover was part of the group that coordinated around JFK's assassination
